title: What Red Flags? Elizabeth Holmes Trial Exposes Investors’ Carelessness
content: Start-up investors have often suspended skepticism while chasing a hot deal. The trial of Ms. Holmes, the founder of Theranos, has put that behavior under the spotlight.
en_title: What Red Flags? Elizabeth Holmes Trial Exposes Investors’ Carelessness
en_content: Start-up investors have often suspended skepticism while chasing a hot deal. The trial of Ms. Holmes, the founder of Theranos, has put that behavior under the spotlight.

title: U.S. Sets Jan. 4 Vaccination Deadline for Big Private Employers
content: The new guidance will cover 84 million workers, who will be required to be fully vaccinated or be tested weekly.
en_title: U.S. Sets Jan. 4 Vaccination Deadline for Big Private Employers
en_content: The new guidance will cover 84 million workers, who will be required to be fully vaccinated or be tested weekly.

title: Facebook Faces New Antitrust Lawsuit
content: The suit, filed by the now defunct photo start-up Phhhoto, accused the social network of stalling on a deal and then putting it out of business.

more_info.byline: By Sheera Frenkel and Daisuke Wakabayashi

en_title: Facebook Faces New Antitrust Lawsuit
en_content: The suit, filed by the now defunct photo start-up Phhhoto, accused the social network of stalling on a deal and then putting it out of business.

title: With Climate Pledges, Some Wall Street Titans Warn of Rising Prices
content: Leaders of some of the world’s biggest financial firms say that the rush to transition to clean energy could have unintended consequences for the global economy.
en_title: With Climate Pledges, Some Wall Street Titans Warn of Rising Prices
en_content: Leaders of some of the world’s biggest financial firms say that the rush to transition to clean energy could have unintended consequences for the global economy.

title: Google Wants to Work With the Pentagon Again, Despite Employee Concerns
content: Three years ago, the company walked away from a Defense Department project after employees objected to it. Now the company is working on a new proposal for the Pentagon.

more_info.byline: By Daisuke Wakabayashi and Kate Conger
des_facet: United States Defense and Military Forces

en_title: Google Wants to Work With the Pentagon Again, Despite Employee Concerns
en_content: Three years ago, the company walked away from a Defense Department project after employees objected to it. Now the company is working on a new proposal for the Pentagon.

title: Fed Takes First Step Toward End of Pandemic Measures
content: The Federal Reserve is dealing with high inflation at a time when millions of workers remain on the job market’s sidelines. Wednesday’s announcement that it will slow bond purchases is a step toward more normal monetary policy.
en_title: Fed Takes First Step Toward End of Pandemic Measures
en_content: The Federal Reserve is dealing with high inflation at a time when millions of workers remain on the job market’s sidelines. Wednesday’s announcement that it will slow bond purchases is a step toward more normal monetary policy.

title: In a ‘Workers Economy,’ Who Really Holds the Cards?
content: Some people are resigning. Some are sitting on the sidelines awaiting a prime gig. Others are flexing their muscles — requesting raises, or remote options — while still clocking in.
en_title: In a ‘Workers Economy,’ Who Really Holds the Cards?
en_content: Some people are resigning. Some are sitting on the sidelines awaiting a prime gig. Others are flexing their muscles — requesting raises, or remote options — while still clocking in.

title: Britain Becomes First to Authorize an Antiviral Pill for Covid-19
content: The authorization of Merck’s easy-to-use Covid treatment, molnupiravir, is a step toward taming the pandemic.

en_title: Britain Becomes First to Authorize an Antiviral Pill for Covid-19
en_content: The authorization of Merck’s easy-to-use Covid treatment, molnupiravir, is a step toward taming the pandemic.

title: Pamela McCorduck, Historian of Artificial Intelligence, Dies at 80
content: She interviewed many of the scientists who were at the heart of the field through the end of the 1970s, and she compiled a groundbreaking history of its early years.

en_title: Pamela McCorduck, Historian of Artificial Intelligence, Dies at 80
en_content: She interviewed many of the scientists who were at the heart of the field through the end of the 1970s, and she compiled a groundbreaking history of its early years.

content: Isomorphic Labs is a spinoff of the London-based artificial intelligence lab DeepMind.

title: Blue Origin Loses Legal Fight Over SpaceX’s NASA Moon Contract
content: A federal judge rejected the argument by Jeff Bezos’ rocket company that NASA unfairly awarded a lunar lander contract to Elon Musk’s firm.
en_title: Blue Origin Loses Legal Fight Over SpaceX’s NASA Moon Contract
en_content: A federal judge rejected the argument by Jeff Bezos’ rocket company that NASA unfairly awarded a lunar lander contract to Elon Musk’s firm.

title: The U.S. trade deficit rose as a surge of imports bogged down the supply chain.
content: The trade deficit in September climbed to $80.9 billion, a record. Imports rose slightly, while exports fell.
en_title: The U.S. trade deficit rose as a surge of imports bogged down the supply chain.
en_content: The trade deficit in September climbed to $80.9 billion, a record. Imports rose slightly, while exports fell.

title: The Bank of England edges closer to raising interest rates, but holds steady.
content: Britain’s central bank said it would wait for more data on the labor market even as inflation is expected to climb to about 5 percent.
en_title: The Bank of England edges closer to raising interest rates, but holds steady.
en_content: Britain’s central bank said it would wait for more data on the labor market even as inflation is expected to climb to about 5 percent.

en_title: Behind Tyson’s Risky Bet on a Vaccine Mandate

content: Big oil producers decided to stick with a scheduled increase, rejecting calls for a bigger jump in production.

title: Do Generations Matter? Well, Maybe.

title: What Jerome Powell Didn’t Do: Lay the Groundwork for Higher Rates

title: The New York Sun, a defunct newspaper, plans a comeback after a sale.
content: Seth Lipsky sold the publication to Dovid Efune, the former top editor of The Algemeiner. Mr. Lipsky will remain the top editor, and Mr. Efune will be publisher and chairman.

title: New Funding Offshoot Expands Grants to Arts Groups in the Southeast
content: As part of the Southern Cultural Treasures program, the Ford Foundation and an Atlanta nonprofit will funnel aid to arts groups led by people of color in that region.
